metadata.description: Known-good marketplace manifest used by audit-gates to prove the validate-schemas CI gate passes on a structurally-valid marketplace.json. Mirrors the shape of the real marketplace catalog: top-level name, owner.name, and a non-empty plugins[] with each entry carrying name + source + version. Touching this file changes the gate's pass-on-good half.

plugins.name: good-fixture-plugin
plugins.description: A known-good plugin entry used to prove the marketplace-schema gate validates correct shapes.
